value_chain_position: Custom ASIC design + networking silicon (Ethernet switching, PCIe/CXL) — builds hyperscaler-specific AI chips (Google TPU, Meta MTIA) and dominates AI-cluster networking fabrics.
relative_comps: AVGO is the largest custom-ASIC design house for hyperscalers; its AI revenue run-rate crossed $4B/quarter. Marvell is the closest peer in custom silicon but is smaller (~$1.6B AI revenue) and relies more on merchant silicon. AVGO's VMware acquisition adds software recurring revenue, creating a hybrid profile its pure-play semis peers lack. Trading around 28x forward earnings vs MRVL at 35x, AVGO looks relatively cheaper given its scale and FCF conversion (43% FCF margin).
